title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
The S&P market remains active, with asset values in both the tanker and dry bulk sectors remaining firm. Modern eco-design vessels are drawing particularly strong interest and achieving premium levels, while older, non-eco tonnage is also maintaining liquidity, successfully attracting buyers and securing solid prices. Dry Cargo
In the Kamsarmax segment, after inviting offers on Monday, the MG MERCURY (ABT 85K DWT, 2016, IMABARI, BEAM 35 M) was acquired by European interests at levels in the low USD 28's m.
